problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
